title: Decenes Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals  Management Plan (CMP). The assessment focused on 2  substances referred to collectively under the CMP as the Decenes Group.
- Summary of publications
- Information gathering Section 71 CMP 2023
Common name (acronym)
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Proposed risk management approach
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
68649-11-6 Table 1 Footnote a
Hydrogenated didecene
1-Decene, dimer, hydrogenated
Meets one or more of the criteria
Refer to proposed risk management approach
68649-12-7 Table 1 Footnote a
Hydrogenated trimer and tetramer of decene (HTTD)
1-Decene, tetramer, mixed with 1-decene trimer, hydrogenated
Table 1 Footnote a This CAS RN is a UVCB (substance of unknown or variable composition, complex reaction products, or biological materials). Table 1 Return to footnote a referrer
This CAS RN is a UVCB (substance of unknown or variable composition, complex reaction products, or biological materials).
Table 1 Return to footnote a referrer
Publication  of the final assessment. The proposed risk management approach was also  published for a 60-day public comment period. The related notice was published  in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 159, No 47 .
Publication  in Canada Gazette, Part I, of a notice under section 71 of the Canadian  Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA).
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment and risk management scope. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 155, No. 2 .

## Information gathering
In June 2023, a notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 157,  No. 25 – June 24, 2023 under section 71 of CEPA 1999.  This notice applies to hydrogenated didecene (CAS RN 68649-11-6) and HTTD (CAS  RN 68649-12-7). More information is available on the Information  gathering with respect to certain substances under the Chemicals Management  Plan web page.
